content_body: We had such a great, relaxing vacation! The cabin couldn't have been more perfect. It was so roomy with all the modern amenities. The best part was that there was no TV in the living room. We actually had to conversate and play games! The location was perfect. Right down the road were hiking trails, tubing and playing along the rocks in the river. The views were amazing. We loved making smores by the fire. We were sad to leave and look forward to coming back. I'll definitely recommend this cabin to our family and friends.
title: "I'll definitely recommend this cabin to our family and friends."
